title: DROP + Invyr Holy Panda Mechanical Keyboard Switches - Plate Mounted Tactile Switches, Cherry MX Style, 67g Spring, by Kailh (70 PCS)
features: THE MOST TACTILE SWITCHES IN THE WORLD: With a name like Holy Panda, these switches had to be epic. Made with stems from Halo switches, housing found on Invyr Panda switches, Holy Panda switches combine the best of both worlds.
THE BEST OF BOTH WORLDS: The result is a snappy, tactile switch that is satisfying to type on.

COMPATIBILITY: Holy Panda switches are compatible with plate-mounted Cherry-style PCB's and are perfect for hot-swap compatible barebones kits such as the Drop ALT, CTRL, SHIFT, ENTR, Carina, Planck, and Preonic.
SPECS: Halo Switch Stems, Polycarbonate top housing, Nylon bottom housing, 67g spring, Plate Mount, and MX-compatible.

reviews.title: Excellent tactile
reviews.text:
I have purchased these, lubed Glorious Panda, and Tecsee Purple panda.

This is the best with the other 2 being very close to as good as this. The tactile-ness is a little better than the other both. With the other 2, the tactile is right at the beginning, while this one starts at the beginning and seems to feel the same until bottoming out. All have the nice bump back.

I didn't lube these and they sound and feel great. I think this is my favorite tactile now. But if you're on budget, I would recommend one of the others.

reviews.title: Not a bad one in the bunch
reviews.text: Got the 90 pack and not a broken or bent pin in the entire bunch. Professionally packed and working 100 percent. All switches tested and working fine. A little expensive but worth it for the fast Amazon delivery.

title: YUNZII Keynovo V2 Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (White)
features: * 【MULTIPLE COLOR CHOICES】Every keyboard needs a cable. The Keynovo V2 coiled keyboard cable features various striking color setups. It's got all the features you need, and it comes easy to match your different keyboard setups.

【4 PINS AVIATOR & EASY INSTALLATION 】the coiled keyboard cable features a detachable 4 pins metal aviator port to support a wide range of connections. The keyboard cable takes USB-A side with metal aviation, Type-C plug, two-section cable connection, and detachable design. The coiled keyboard cable delivers a high-performance in every aspect, elegant addition to any setup.

【 HIGH-PERFORMANCE QUALITY】This performance-tested keyboard cable with a flexible coiled design, metal aviator, durable TPE material. It delivers superior and high-end quality and visual aesthetics. The cable is an ideal replacement cable for any mechanical keyboard.

【LONGER LENGTH AND WIDER COMPATIBILITY】The V2 custom coiled aviator cable has upgraded length wit 155cm straight cable, and 14cm coiled cable. The total length of the cable reaches 170cm. The coil cable diameter is 2cm. Compared to last version, the upgraded V2 keyboard cable can be compatible with most mechanical keyboard, e.g KC84.

* ONLY CABLE INCLUDED!【USB-C INTERFACE, USB 2.0/3.0 COMPATIBLE】Designed to work flawlessly with any USB type C device, the USB to Type-C coiled aviator cable works with mechanical gaming keyboard and type-c mobile phones charging.

reviews.title: Decent. Kind of small coil.
reviews.text:
YUNZII AKKO Coiled Keyboard Cable with Aviator USB Cable for Type-C Mechanical Gaming Keyboard (Sakura)

This cable just ok. It's not bad but definitely lacks the quality feel of others. The coil is small around 1/2" outer diameter. The connections are good and fit in my keyboard well and the aviator cable looks good. For me, the cable from the coil to the USBc connector is a bit too long and looks kind of weird being so far away from the keyboard. Also, the coil just looks like an old phone coiled cable. It just isn't for me, but the price is good, and it doesn't look half bad.

title: YMDK ANSI ISO PBT Doubleshot Shine Through Pudding Keycaps Suitable for MX Mechanical Keyboard Corsair Razer SF KBD75 Tada68 DZ60 (Black Pudding Full Set)(Only Keycap)

reviews.title: Looks great, shows off my RGB light on my Keychron  K4 now.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:2f9f1dbaca0dc20e2ddfad733f0e051c]] Looks great, shows off my RGB lights on my Keychron K4 now. The only downside is not having the function icons on the keys anymore. I’ll have to work on getting some little stickers.
Edit:Added a Movie Clip

reviews.title: Great but some keys may not be suitable for your keyboard
reviews.text: they look really pretty tbh. However some keys had fitment issues. The spacebar had their slots just a little bit off so it couldnt fit. The caps lock is upside down. The windows and menu keys did not like being next to other keys. Other than that, the rest of the keys fit great.

reviews.title: They work great
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:eaa9e5229cc02ed31da7ef98d0a78ee4]] Replaced the most of my bottom row on my keyboard with these key caps.  They are good, the LED shines through and it really nice! for Corsair keyboards.

reviews.title: Quality can be improved but overall great price and compatibility
reviews.text: One of the few sets that actually fit my K95 (Corsair bottom row) Plenty of extra pieces for other keyboards too. The color black of these pieces appear much more grey compared to he caps my keyboard came with. And each piece has a little dimple at the top where they were cast or molded. Not the end of the world, but other sets don't have that. Also found small imperfections in several pieces. Time will tell how they do over prolonged use. Pretty good for the price, solid 4 of 5.

reviews.title: Just what I needed
reviews.text: I wanted some keycaps to match the theme of my keyboard but it's a struggle finding keycaps that fit the sizing of R1 on a Corsair keyboard. This is exactly what I needed!

reviews.title: really nice keycaps

reviews.title: I liked it very much until it started disconnecting
reviews.text:
I've only had it for a week and the type C end moves and it disconnects from my keyboard. it's not a lot but enough to power off my key board.

But, aside from that little piece of failure, i really like the sturdiness and the quality of the work on it. It's also at a great price. That's why i'm not returning this item, it's actually really good and as long as the cable is held in place it works great. Maybe it's my WFH wonky setup. I would buy more if i needed more cables, but I'm set for life with cables.

really nice cable, i would recommend to others.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: Purchased for my son.  He says it works great.

reviews.title: Great upgrade for any Keyboard, best with custom rugged builds.
reviews.text: I wanted to get a substitute USB-C cable for my keyboard and found this listing. Was intrigued by the interchangeable inputs as well as the mechanical design. The price seemed steep, but the uses, ergonomics and possible durability of the cable seemed like a good investment. Mine came functional with an included "Kraken Keybaord" sticker, thank you! The only problem I found was that the USB-C male input was a tad long for my ANNE PRO Clone, a Dierya x Kemove DK61 60% Keyboard. It might be my keyboard's own build quality, or that maybe these cables are meant for more rugged custom boards. If I move my keyboard drastically it might disconnect, but luckily that rarely happens. I'm more than satisfied with the cable, more like enamored. I'd buy again for a future custom keyboard build for sure.

reviews.title: Nice keys, font size a little horsey
reviews.text:
Note: I chose the Grey/Beige set. This set (YMDK 96 84 ANSI ISO Key) went on just fine, and are a great frugal find.

I bought these for an relatively inexpensive TKL mechanical wireless keyboard (RK87G) because the OEM keycaps were set in a truly fugly and illegible typeface.

These YMDKs feel good, and have a slightly deeper "thunk" when they bottom out. The two-character keys are typeset vertically, as Underwood and Remington intended. Although the font size on most of the keys is a big, they are fine and give the keyboard a bit of a homemade retro look.

NOTE Specific to the RK87G: This YMDK set does not have a ScrlLk key. The right Shift and right CTRL on this set are a little too small, so I just left the old ones on. I also left the OEM ScrlLk, Page Up, and arrow keys on because they have symbols for controlling the RGB LEDs. If you use the RKs function keys for app and control shortcuts, you may want to leave those on as well.

May 30, 2021
I've had these for a little over six months now. Still a great value set the money. I installed them on a keyboard I use for hours on end nearly every day. The printing on the beige keys hasn't faded, but I've noticed that the grey keys with white printing are beginning to fade. I'm not taking any stars off because before I purchased these I had already read other reviewers who had the same experience.

reviews.title: Good for the money
reviews.text: It didn’t give me the thoc sound that I wanted but given the price it is good enough

reviews.title: Rough surface, washed out colors
reviews.text:
These caps seems well made enough, with a rough texture that provides ample grip without having a sandpaper effect on your fingers. The colors are a fair bit less saturated than the images make them look. Slightly annoying but they're still quite nice.

Do note that this set does not come with a long shift or scroll lock cap. This isn't an issue as they'll be going on a 65% for me but if you're looking to put them on a full size board you may be disappointed.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: satisfied with this purchase although the caps do feel a tad bit rough

title: GAMDIAS Hermes E2 7 Color Backlit Gaming Mechanical Keyboard, 87 Keys, Blue Switches, Anti-ghosting, Multimedia Control Keys, with Metal Plate (Hermes E2)
description: Hermes E2 7 color spectrum mechanical gaming keyboard exceeds basic user demand and enriches the distinct design of the GAMDIAS Hermes Series. The Hermes E2 7 color spectrum is small but elegant; simple yet powerful and offers enhanced durability. By using small tenkeyless keyboard can save the space,and also makes the keyboard and mouse to become closer, so you can maximize the comfort and accuracy of your operation. GAMDIAS Certified Blue Switches with a 50 million actuation lifecycle, 7 color spectrum backlighting , WASD-Arrow key swap, Multimedia control keys, Keyboard lock, Windows key disable, and stylish/elegant metal plate design.

reviews.title: Quite decent for the price - better quality than I expected
reviews.text:
I was skeptical about purchasing this combo because of the cheap price and the sketchy reviews, but I'll admit I'm impressed. I only spent $22.50 for the entire combo (used/refurbished). I expected the mouse to be dirt cheap from what the reviews were saying, but it feels quite solid to me. I played some Boarderlands and some League of Legends on the combo last night and it was comfortable and they both held up well. The mouse has a dpi changer that works great. For me personally I think it may have too many modes (somewhere around 4 or 5). I personally just like having 2 or 3 because when you're in game it gets complicated to remember which dpi setting you are on and cycle through to the correct one all within a few seconds.

They keyboard isn't overly bright. It is kind of is hard to read the keys at an angle, but other than that, it seems to be a great keyboard so far.

This is a good buy, for the low price of $20-30, for a basic gamin setup.

Typing is also decently comfortable, just takes some getting used to since I am used to flat keys.

reviews.title: Poor quality - lasted about 3 months.
reviews.text: died after 3 months.  very disappointing because this was quite expensive.  I've had another gaming keyboard for over 3 years and it is still working.  Buy the Razor instead.  Backlit keyboard was nice while it lasted...

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Works great and honestly the best keyboard I've used and I love the adjustable weights on the mouse!

reviews.title: Great key functionality
reviews.text:
I love, love, love this keyboard. The feel of the keys as they are pressed is great. I'm an old school typer (keyboarder) and I feel like these give me the feeling I was missing. I think I even type faster with this keyboard. I am not a gamer so I don't use it for those thing.
I bought this based on a review that was done on Craft Computing on YouTube.

reviews.title: Amazing gaming & multitasking keyboard – improved my gaming and my everyday typing.
reviews.text:
I purchased this keyboard to go with my first custom-built gaming rig that I built around 2 months ago. I had been getting so frustrated with my old standard Logitech keyboard and I wanted an upgrade. I am not new to gaming, but this was my first ‘serious’ build, so I went with the advice of many of my more experienced friends and purchased a mechanical keyboard.

I needed a keyboard that could multitask as well. I work as a web developer, and I am in grad school for marketing – I do a lot of typing. So I wanted something that was going to last and perform in all of these uses – and still improve my gaming experience. After doing a TINY bit of keyboard research, I chose the blue switches since I do a lot more “regular typing” than gaming.

I’ve had the keyboard for about 2 days, and in that time I’ve used it to play the DOOM Multiplayer Beta, and several hours of Fallout 4. So far this morning I’ve written 2 blog posts, one paper, and now this review :D.

My first impression of this product was it was HEAVY. Not in a bad way, just in a very sturdy was that was a sharp contrast to what I had had before in my standard keyboard. Since this is a desktop keyboard, there’s no need for this keyboard to be light. The other thing I noticed was the high quality braided USB cable. I must’ve missed that feature when I ordered because I was pleasantly surprised – the USB connector is also gold plated. I did not expect that for such a low price point of around $100. (Note: I did receive a discount on the product in exchange for my honest review.)

I also received this keyboard exceptionally fast. I ordered on a Thursday afternoon and got it Saturday morning – no Saturday delivery fee!

**Important** So the package comes with a guide that is very concise – pay attention! I got confused when I didn’t get a ‘new hardware found’ notification like the manual said. However, the rest of the instructions worked fine, so it must not have mattered. I’m on Windows 10.

I was surprised to find that the shortcut keys (like for volume and track control) worked without any software at all. To access the different light settings, you just press FN and select the pattern from the keyboard itself. I settled on FN+0 – It’s a responsive setting that lights up the keys you type and then lets them fade – very cool since I don’t want to have the keyboard lit all the time. I’ll admit though – this thing is pretty, when I leave my desk I’ve been quickly pressing FN+Ins to get it to do the wave effect if I’m gonna be away for a while.

So that’s just the extra stuff – let’s talk about the performance. I can without a doubt say this keyboard has made a difference in my playing. The game mode is essential – make sure you enable that when you launch a game. The DOOM multiplayer beta was probably a bad gauge since that game is ridiculously hard anyway – but I noticed a marked difference in my performance on Fallout 4. I’m not going to pretend to be a keyboard expert, all I can say is that the response time was way better.

And I am SO glad I went with blue switches. Writing papers, I feel like an old world typist – the mechanical and audible feedback I get from typing is so satisfying. I have noticed reduced typos from ‘accidental’ slips. The audible click sound doesn’t really sound like the bulky old keyboards, it’s more of a quick, clean clicking. It isn’t loud, but it’s NOT whisper quiet, which I prefer.

Pros:
- The rubber feet keep it in place on my desk (I am one of those crazy people who don’t use a slide-out keyboard tray).
- The keyboard is study, and well made. A great value for the money.
- No special software needed to change effects and settings, everything is controlled on the keyboard, and the instructions are only 1 page.
- The game features are useful! Locking the windows key, consecutive attack mode.
- Custom patterns – this is essential when gaming. I used it to highlight the keys used when playing.
- Excellent physical and audible feedback when typing – extremely satisfying.
- The confidence that comes with the 50 million actuation lifecycle (I type a LOT)

Cons:
- There weren’t any instructions on what to do if you never got the ‘new hardware found’ message when plugging in the keyboard. This confused me ' but I figured it out. If this happens to you – just proceed with the manual, as far as I can tell, it makes no difference.
- As far as I can tell, you can’t make ALL the keys light up one color. I might be overlooking something though. This might be a con for some.

I would say this keyboard is perfect for someone like me who wants a serious gaming keyboard, but is ultimately a multitasker. You will definitely notice a difference if switching from a non-mechanical keyboard.
The quality of this keyboard has me anxious to try other GAMDIAS products, and I highly recommend it to anyone looking for an upgrade!

title: Redragon K556 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard M612 Wired Gaming Mouse Bundle
features: This bundle includes a K556 gaming keyboard and a M612 Mouse.

K556 Keyboard: The mechanical brown switch offers the best tactile typing experience, also being ever so slightly quieter, fitting for office or gaming use. And you will get 8 spared switches as a gift.

K556 Keyboard: RGB LED adjustable lighting with 6-themed backlights -18 lighting models. You can also adjust their brightness with FN+“↑”and“↓” Besides, there is a 9-color single backlit mode for this keyboard.

M612 Mouse: Pentakill, 5 DPI Levels - Geared with 5 redefinable DPI levels (default as: 500/1000/2000/3000/4000), easy to switch between different game needs. Dedicated demand of DPI options between 500-8000 is also available to be processed by software.

M612 Mouse: Any Button is Reassignable - 11 programmable buttons are all editable with customizable tactical keybinds in whatever game or work you are engaging. 1 rapid fire + 2 side macro buttons offer you a better gaming and working experience.

reviews.title: Shine through is very disappointing
reviews.text: I got these primarily because I liked the orange and black color scheme and the advertised shine through features but the backlit brightness is only fair to poor on these (I'm being generous giving it 3 stars, I think).  Even the cheap $6.00 keycap set ($0.38 after discounts) with a similar color scheme I got from aliexpress is brighter than these.  However, since I need those 1u-sized right Alt, FN and Ctrl keycaps for my Royal Kludge RK96 90% keyboard, I'm not returning therm, though I basically paid $20 for those 3 keycaps :/

title: Akko Keycaps Top Printed Shine-Through with ASA Profile, White Keycaps PBT Double-Shot Keycaps for Mechanical Keyboards
features: SHINE-THROUGH KEYCAPS – Deliver premium and shining RGB experiences with Akko ASA Shine-through keycap sets! Come with extremely durable and resistant double-shot Shine-through keycaps, the legend shine through keycaps brings unique and great RGB effects.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including 61-key(60%), 64-key, 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%), Alice and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.
PBT DOUBLE-SHOT – Double-shot keycaps are extremely durable and resistant to wear even for decades, and the legends are particularly vibrant, sharp with high contrast.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure mechanical switches and mainstream keyboards including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: Not the brightest shine-through, but for the material and price it's worth it.
reviews.text:
Akko's ASA profile is a taller profile kind of like SA. Feels great to type on and is fine for gaming if you don't mind the extra travel time on each keystroke. The finish on these has a great texture and it's PBT so it shouldn't wear out quickly. "Shouldn't" being relative since I tend to shred keycaps as though my fingers were first dipped in acid before typing.

30.00 for keycaps of this quality and for the number of keys is great especially in a hobby where everything is over priced, over hyped, and overly bogged down in group buys and pre-orders that take literal years to fulfill.

reviews.title: Shine-Through keycaps, look amazing
reviews.text: These shine-through keycaps look awesome.  They are super easy to install, like most keycaps.  It is just a bit time consuming.  I love being able to change out keys and switches and seem to collect keycaps.  These are great and sound and feel amazing.

title: Akko Pink Keycaps Set, Clear Translucent 155-Key ASA Profile Keys with Mac Keycaps Set for Mechanical Keyboard
features: TRANSPARENT KEYCAPS – Deliver premium and shining RGB experiences with Akko ASA Clear keycap sets! Made by polycarbonate, the keycap is solid and translucent so that your switches and RGB array can shine through. Characters on the ASA Clear keycaps are processed through UV printing with wear-resistant and scratch-resistant tests, and are not easily wiped off.

ULTIMATE CUSTOMIZATION FLEXIBILITY – Comes with Akko ASA profile, the 155-key keycap set is suitable for a variety of layouts including 61-key(60%), 64-key, 68-key (65%), 84-key (75%), 87-key (TKL), 98-Key (Classic 1800), 100-Key (96%), Alice and full 108-key size, and thus offers strong flexibility for keyboard personalization.

MAC KEYCAPS & NOVELTY KEYS – The keycap set is designed for both Windows and Mac users, where Mac modifiers CMD/OPT are offered in different sizes. The transparent keycap set also features extra cute animal themed novelty keys for decoration.

ASA PROFILE – Akko’s proprietary ASA profile is tailored to offer a more familiar and comfortable typing experience by matching the height for OEM profile while maintaining the aesthetics and spheric top of the classic SA profile.

FOR MX STRUCTURE SWITCHES – Compatible with MX structure mechanical switches and mainstream keyboards including but not limited to Cherry, Gateron, Akko and Kailh. Large keys of non-standard layout & stabilizers may not be compatible.

reviews.title: It feels so nice to type!
reviews.text: I really like the feel of the glossy keys. I wish more keycaps came with the gloss feel like these. RBG lights look awesome! I want more!!! :)

reviews.title: It feels so nice to type!
reviews.text: I really like the feel of the glossy keys. I wish more keycaps came with the gloss feel like these. RBG lights look awesome! I want more!!! :)

reviews.title: Impressed
reviews.text: Very good packaging and acceptable quality

reviews.title: Unique keys look cool with RGB. Some drawbacks.
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Beautifully and conveniently packaged and organized. Caps come on three trays with plastic film on them so that nothing will have shifted in transit. It's very easy to replace your caps and keep your old set save and organized in the trays, too. Simple to find any specialized keys that you may need in the trays.
- Print is easy to see and seems durable/high contrast. No funky fonts that are hard to read.
- Looks awesome with RGB.

Cons:

- There are no tactile nubs on the F and J keys to indicate homerow. As a touch typist, this was almost a dealbreaker.
- Color is way off from the images in the description. The images in the description show a clear white color to the keycaps. Along with the "clear/translucent" descriptors, I believed I was going to get more of a white/iced translucent look. Nope. The caps are basically colorless clear. They are smooth and glossy with no texture. I left some of the OG white keys on my keyboard to show the color clearly side by side. Not the look I was expecting from the images and description.

Good to know:

- I've never used ASA profile before, and generally prefer XDA, so these are a little taller than I'm used to on XDA, but more rounded (and, I think, more comfortable, than OEM. I had some lousy stock OEM caps on my old keyboard, and I do feel these caps are an improvement. They are sufficiently dense, and give me a slightly deeper, more muted sound from my keypresses with my brown switches, which I like, compared to the more plasticky/hollow caps that were original to my board.
- Despite having a glossy finish, I don't find these keys to be slippery--the slight curvature leads your fingertips toward the center of the keys easily and they're comfortable to use.
- I really hate that there are no homerow nubs. Who skips that? Come on.

reviews.title: No tactile bumps on F and J, amazing for backlighting
reviews.text:
I have the “White” color option in this set of keycaps from Akko. White is a bit misleading, the color is actually glossy and nearly translucent. This is actually what I wanted, I was looking all over for nearly clear keycaps, but I did want to point that out.

If you like maximum backlighting, this might be the set for you. I was using white pudding caps before, and I thought they let a lot of light shine through. The difference is night and day. These Akko caps show backlighting on all sides and the top of the cap. I’ve included a picture of a white pudding cap surrounded by the clear Akkos to show the difference.

I’m using the keycaps with Akko Vintage White (MX) switches. The keycaps fit well, but they took a bit of force to fit on the switches.

I am disappointed the F and J keys do not have ridges or bumps. I’m a touch typist and using an ergo board with 56 keys, I rely on those ridges to help me orient my hands. This set has so much variety that I wish Akko had included doubles of F and J or even blanks with the ridges.

Speaking of keycap variety: the set has some great 1u options! My current keyboard is an Iris Rev 6, all keys are 1u size. But most keycap sets don’t have 1u keycaps for Shift, Control, Command/Windows, and so on. This set does, which is a big help. I also like the cute animal keycaps, they add some fun to my board.

I believe the ASA height is original to Akko. They have a helpful height chart on their site, comparing ASA to OEM, JDA, OSA, and Cherry. I was using OEM before, and switching to ASA and the glossy feel of the keycaps took about two days of adjustment.

title: HUO JI Double Shot Keycap Set -104 Translucent Backlit Key Cap, Golden Metal Color for All Mechanical Keyboards with Key Puller

It is shiny but Not fingerprint proof. Please do not use any sharp things to rub it, or the golden color may fade.  Keycaps only, NO Keyboard included.

reviews.title: Not doublshot
reviews.text:
These two keys: < and > have already worn through. These are not double shot keycaps. They are a semi-translucent keycap with a finish over it that wears through. Doubleshot has an injection molded insert inside the keycap with the translucent area cut out of the keycap.
Should you not care about that, here is some more info. They look okay in the light, but in the dark there is a strong screen glare off of them that can be distracting.

I rate one star for lying about the nature of the product.

reviews.title: eh, cheap.  removed them almost instantly.
reviews.text: slippery, their feel is very cheap and i ended up removing them and regretting my buy.  i have bought other replacment keys before.

reviews.title: I didn't try them...
reviews.text: The color wasn't what I expected so I didn't open the very nice plastic packaging before returning.

reviews.title: DOES NOT FIT CORSAIR STRAFE RGB.
reviews.text: Overall, it's pretty cool. I like it a lot. It is very smudge, and the foil is cheap so it wont last all that long.

reviews.title: Arrived missing key caps but overall pretty good if you have the right keyboard
reviews.text:
Not a keyboard, just key caps to "bling out" your existing keyboard.

I purchased the following keyboard and these key caps fit perfectly. The keyboard (not this item, which is only key caps) comes with a red plastic tool that you can use to pop out the key caps:

Redragon K551 Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB LED Rainbow Backlit Wired Keyboard with Red Switches for Windows Gaming PC (104 Keys, Black)

Even the font on the key caps matches the keyboard I bought separately, and the backlighting shines through the font.

The only down side: the set of key caps is missing about 1/4 of the keys (see attached picture).

I would give it all five stars if it had arrived containing all the key caps advertised in the product listing. It was a surprise prank gift for a coworker, which is why I made do with what we got.

title: Gateron China Joy Switch Mechanical Keyboard Custom 45gf 50gf Pom Series 5 Pin Purple Blue CJ Translucent Mechanical Keyboard Switch (10 PCS, Box CJ Dark Blue 3Pin)
features: Package Included：Only CJ switches，you have four styles to choose from
Gateron CJ (China Joy) is the linear switches.Lifetime 80 million times.Stem and base is POM material.Box Switch Spring is 22mm gold plated.Normal Switch Spring is 15 mm gold plated.
We got lubed and unlubed,3 pin and 5 pin edition which can be picked for different customers

The Actuation force of all box Switches is 45 gf, and the Actuation force of all nomal 5pin Switches is 50 gf，The Actuation distance of all box Switches is 1.2mm, and the Actuation distance of all nomal 5pin Switches is 2mm
Ordinary distinguish whether it is lubricated by color, Box distinguish whether lubricated by 3pin and 5 products

reviews.title: ULTRA Smooth, ZERO scratch and SAVES your RGBs, what else do you want?
reviews.text: These are so smooth you wont even believe it until you put it up to your ear and will hear nothing going on on the inside of the switch. After trying the Oil Kings and being super impressed, I said fine lets try the CJ Dark Blue Lubed switch and see what the fuss is about and I am glad I did. It is the end game switch. Stop the search right here. These are dead smooth a 10 out of 10, OK are about 7-10 and the Gateron Red Pro are somewhere like 5-10. They are all hard to tell and distinguish between the smoothness but once you test them out to your ear/finger you will be able to tell. I don't believe you need to lube these because well, they come lubed and since they are so smooth I don't see a need. Also the benefit with this switch is that this CJ Dark Blue comes with a slot for the LED to shine through just fine, so you will save your RGB as I have and I am glad.

title: TECWARE Phantom 87 Key Mechanical Keyboard, RGB led, Outemu Brown Switch
features: RGB BACKLIGHTING - Enhance your gaming experience with 18 pre-set configurations on the mechanical keyboard, or create a unique one to match your setup

OUTEMU SWITCHES - The gaming mechanical keyboard comes with Outemu mechanical switches for precise gaming and comfortable typing. Spare switches + keycap & switch remover tools are provided for easy replacement
FIBERGLASS PCB - Built with SMD LEDs and FR-4 fiberglass printed circuit board, this Tecware mechanical keyboard is able to withstand extended periods of intensive and hardcore gaming sessions

DOUBLE-SHOT KEYCAPS – Featuring an all-new font, the keycaps on this mechanical keyboard are double-shot ABS (dual-injection molding process) which guarantee high resistance against surface wear; markings that cannot be worn off as they are physically part of the keycaps

SPEED ADVANTAGE - With full N-key rollover and 1000Hz pooling rate, Tecware keyboards allow faster and smoother gaming experience. The depression of each key is detected individually, meaning all key presses will be registered, no matter how many keys you press down simultaneously

reviews.title: Great quality
reviews.text: Very bright lights. Click clack noise keys. Small the way I like it. Portable. Works great. Has usb cover cap too.

reviews.title: Excellent keyboard.
reviews.text: This is my first mechanical keyboard and I really love the quality of this keyboard. The LED's are bright and on keyboard LED controls are very useful as you don't have to depend on the software. The keyboard feels very premium and on par with any other expensive keyboard. I would highly recommend this to others looking for new mechanical keyboard.

reviews.title: the smaller one with the browns... i love it
reviews.text: ok the onboard RGB stuff is really why i bought this. Its not Razer RGB but for +/- 50 bucks? oh hell yea. The keys are great, if your used to others it might take a sec to get accustomed, but if you use it your fingers will get to know it real nice :) Solid thru and thru.

Yes, there are different color modes, but you CANT set it to one color. I am so dissapointed with this keyboard because I was really excited to try out the typewriter style keys, will definitely be returning and getting an ACTUAL rgb customizable keyboard.

reviews.title: Looks Good, Feels Good
reviews.text: I bought these as an alternative to replacing the whole keyboard. I have an old Das Keyboard with blank keys and cherry blue switches. With these keycaps and dampner rings these keys feel really nice. Everything fit except the space bar, which is pretty good for something thing not custom to my keyboard brand. The keycap puller has thin arms to get between the keys easily, which was nice because the one I got with the dampners was too thick. By swapping these keys out I feel like I saved myself $100 since I didn't buy a whole new keyboard.

reviews.title: Great value fast shipping!
reviews.text: Corsair k68 all keys worked cept Windows key and space bar. Oh well overall everything great!

reviews.title: Better then the ones that came on my keyboard
reviews.text: I use my computer everyday so I wanted my keyboard to look a little better and these definitely did the job. Overall you won't be disappointed and the quality is good dosen't feel cheaply made

reviews.title: Excellent, thick keycaps, amazing value for the money
reviews.text: I was a little hesitant to buy these keycaps because they seemed too good to be true for the price, but sometimes you take a risk and it pays off! These keys are very nicely thick and have a good texture to them, and the side printing looks good.

reviews.title: Nice, inexpensive keycaps.
reviews.text: I bought these keycaps to refresh an older mech that I'd worn the keys down to smooth nubs. Didn't expect too much for this price. They came packaged neatly, all fit quite well, and feel good under the fingers. They're a little thicker than my stock keycaps, and I had no problems like others mentioned with the spacebar. The side printing is nice for those that don't touch type, but would still like the look of a blank keyboard. I may pick up another set of these for my home keyboard.

reviews.title: Can be used stock!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:528307786b36a4c2c9833ddd389101cb]] They come with a small amount of lube pre applied. Usually, prelubed switches are inconsistent in my experience but these ones are really good. I decided to not lube them at all. EDIT: got a few more batches, they're not as consistent. But seller was nice enough to get them replaced.

The stems are long pole. As a result, it has a nice bottom out sound.

It was noticeably heavier coming from a 50g switch to these that are 63g, but overtime I got adjusted and had no problems typing with them.

Overall a great buy, though I wish it was priced more competitively.

Using on Drop Preonic with MT3 Camillo, plateless, tape mod

reviews.title: Nice linears
reviews.text:
Starting off not sure who's at fault for this as it's only fulfilled by Amazon but one of my bags was missing a few switches (one bag was open and all the switches were rattling around inside the amazon pouch it arrived in) I counted 5 missing and there wasn't a silica gel packet either, the other bags were fine.
complaint aside they feel really nice and the factory lube seems to be well done as wish they had a "3 pin" option and different switch amounts 35 2 is too few and 3 is too many (unless some get lost in transit like mine lol) 90 would be a good option for the TKL/75% gang

reviews.title: Will be Using Right Away
reviews.text: In building & repairing computers these key switches are used very often. Mainly for high-end (over $100) keyboards that the serious gamers use. What they do is tough on the keyboards and often switches break or become less responsive which may lead to a gamer losing a match. These snap right in to the sockets and can instantly rebuild the whole keyboard like new. I realize they would not be used by your everyday person or casual gamer but when it gets serious they are  the switches to be used.

reviews.title: Nice Linear
reviews.text: These are nice and smooth and sound wonderful.  I'm not a linear fan usually, but I do like them in my modifier keys (shift, backspace, enter, and space) because I don't like the return sound a tactile makes while in a larger key.  These are perfect for that as they don't have a high pitch and there's no spring ping to even think of!  I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for a lighter-weight linear switch with some style.

reviews.title: Great Stock!
reviews.text: The switches sounds great and feels good to use. The lube in this is not bad at all and you don't hear any ping or scratchiness. The bottom out is much more than I am used to, but I do enjoy it otherwise.

reviews.title: Good quality, thick keycaps
reviews.text: Fits my case perfectly. Feels nice and looks nice.

reviews.title: Good quality and adorable!
reviews.text:
Key caps are textured, but do not feel rough. The textured PBT will keep them from getting shiny as fast (compared to smooth ABS). No print errors. Fit the Cherry switches perfectly. They feel weighty and durable. The plastic is cut cleanly, no rough edges. Nice big font, centered on each key. I am very happy with these.

The only thing I am a bit disappointed about is that the special (non-standard) Capslock key does not fit my keyboard; the slot where you are supposed to insert the switch is not centered correctly. But, it isn't enough of a disappointment for me to knock down my rating.

reviews.title: Perfect!
reviews.text: These keycaps are made of PBT, which is about the highest grade of plastic that you can get for your keycaps. I love the flatter profile of the XDA keycaps. The print on the keys is very classic, large, and easy to read. This keycap set contains both peach and sea green keycaps for the function keys, space bar, escape, and enter keys. You can mix and match them until your hearts delight. You even get some extra keys for media keys if your keyboard has them, plus menu and function keys. You get a wide variety of keys that will fit most Cherry MX style keyboards easily. The plastic is nice and textured so your fingers won't slip off the keycaps when you are typing on the keyboard. I would highly recommend these keycaps as an upgrade to ABS keycaps, and for customizing your keyboard in a cute vintage style.

title: YUNZII AKKO CS Switch, 3 Pins for DIY MX Mechanical Keyboard, 45 pcs (Ocean Blue Switch)
features: 【About AKKO CS Switches】 AKKO Custom Series (CS) switches are the newly designed 3-pin switches for customers who have specific typing and gaming needs. Each package has 45 switches. Six types of switches are available and no matter which kind of typing feeling you want, we cover it all.

【Compatibility】AKKO CS switches are designed with a general MX structure so that they can fit most keycaps sets. The switch has 3 pins but also fit in all 3 pins and 5 pins keyboards. Based on the strong compatibility, you can easily change the switch and customize your mechanical keyboard.
【Built-in LED Slot 】The AKKO CS switches are equipped with a north-facing LED slot for LED modification. It is also compatible with SMD LED, provides more fun and options for keyboard enthusiasts.

【Durable Lifespan & Improved Performance】With a lifespan of approximately 50 million times of keystrokes, you are assured of high quality and a long lifespan. The CS switches feature a spiral spring design that can make the typing more comfortable.

【Ocean Blue Tactile Switch】The tactile bump of the Ocean Blue switch is at 0.55mm and it ends at 1.88mm, which gives long-continued feedback. Different from the blue and brown switch, the Ocean blue switch has a medium tactile position that can give you an excellent experience in typing and gaming.

reviews.title: Very good for the price
reviews.text: I'm not a mechanical keyboard connoisseur, but needed to replace the switches on my cheap Redragon keyboard to get rid of the loud clicking noise. The original switches were blue switch clones and the clicks will wake up the neighbors. These are cheap enough that I decided to give them a try. They are pretty good in terms of touch and sound, from my perspective and my use. Will definitely resort to these again in the future if I need to replace keyboard switches, especially for budget keyboards.

title: Wireless Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, 104 Keys Standard US Layout RGB Backlit Rechargeable Mechanical Feel Waterproof Mute Mouse for Gamers(White)
features: 【2 in 1 wireless keyboard and mouse set】：This combo includes a 104-key Standard American layout gaming keyboard and a light-up gaming mouse. The keyboard and mouse both support charging, and a common charging cable is included in the package.

【2.4Ghz wireless connection】：The keyboard and mouse share a dongle, the dongle is located at the bottom of the mouse, the maximum support for 32 feet using distance. (Please open the keyboard and mouse switch before use)
【RGB backlit keyboard】 : Keyboard is equipped with FN+(1-5) 5 groups of shortcut keys to adjust the keyboard lighting in 19 color modes. Keyboard brightness adjustable, night use is not affected.

【Wireless Gaming Mouse】: This wireless mouse features a cool crackle pattern and 7-color auto-change breathing backlight design, 7 buttons, symmetrical design of the mouse, and 20 million keystrokes life.

【Plug and Play】:The keyboard and mouse are factory charged and paired, just turn on the keyboard and mouse switch and insert the dongle to use. (Note: If you lose the connection, please complete the charge, reset the pairing code pairing can be)

reviews.title: Pretty, but this WILL break within 3 months
reviews.text: Very low quality. I've replaced everything once before and now need another but no warranty.

reviews.title: Needs a dimmer or more contrast
reviews.text: Hard to see the key characters when lit

reviews.title: Nice Product
reviews.text: I recommend the black keyboard, for one reason: it lights up the keys, showing the letters, and the numbers. With the white keyboard, and the light it just doesn't show the letters and numbers as easily because the light against the white is too much alike. I returned this for this reason only: great buying/returning experience. I recommend this seller. The product is very nice, and of good quality.

reviews.title: Broken Already...
reviews.text: I bought this back in October 2022. Off and on switch broke off. Keyboard is stuck in the on position.

reviews.title: Lasted two months. Performed great for two months suddenly died.
reviews.text: Loved until it died an early death.

title: Wired Keyboard and Mouse Combo, FEDARFOX Full Size Backlit Illuminated Rainbow Keyboard and Mouse Set Gaming Keyboard for Windows, Computer, Desktop, PC,PS (Black)

Stylish Keyboard and Practical Design: The newest rainbow keyboard is not like the ordinary keyboard, and made bold innovations such as the removable Hand-Rest (no need screw) ,phone holder and floating keycap are perfectly integrated nto the design, making the keyboard not only have the beauty of technology, but also more practical and worth

Backlit Gaming Mouse - The wired mouse has Intelligent colorful rainbow breathing lights, design back and go ahead functions of left side button , 4 adjustable Dpi levels(800-1200-2400-3200) and non-slip design, provide accurate positioning and responsive, the gaming experience is more vivid
Wide Compatibility: It compatible with windows10/8/7, windows vista, windows Xp, mac,Android. Support for PC desktop laptop computer Google TV smart TV, and works well for Ps4 Game / Xbox One

Easy to Use & Ergonomic Keyboard Mouse - Just plug to your device's port and play , easy to use. Ergonomic design of both wired keyboard and mouse release your hand from fatigue, and the professional mechanical feeling bring you fantastic usage experience

reviews.title: Solid
reviews.text: This keyboard and mouse set is solid.  They have a durable aluminum body.  The keys are mechanical in look, but press easy without any noise.  The colors are nice and shine through the keys so you can see which letter it is in the dark.  It gives off just the right amount of light.  They look slick together on a desk and operate well.  Great little set.

reviews.title: Nice keyboard!!
reviews.text:
Updated review.. The mouse quit working after about 12 hours of use. This is disappointing because when it worked it was nice and responsive and was comfortable. When I left the original review everything worked fine..

This keyboard looks and works good. The back lighting makes it easy to see in the dark and the keys are precise and feel good while typing. The real aluminum frame is sturdy and looks good too. The phone holder is a nice touch. I would say it's worth it for the price.
